pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must declare Java 21 to compile and run on the target JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may have compatibility issues or lack support for Java 21 features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version that supports Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins may not correctly handle Java 21 bytecode or features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove deprecated source and target configuration in favor of the release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the preferred way to set Java version in modern Maven compiler plugin; source/target are redundant and deprecated.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit version from build-helper-maven-plugin to inherit from Spring Boot parent.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot parent manages plugin versions; explicit versions can cause conflicts or be outdated.

src/main/java/pl/piomin/samples/spring/j.general_idea: Remove explicit @Autowired annotation from field injection to rely on Spring's implicit injection for single constructors or fields.
Migrate JPA annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
src/main/java/pl/piomin/samples/spring/j.why_exists: The javax.persistence package was removed from the classpath in Spring Boot 3.x (which requires Jakarta EE 9+), causing a compile-time error 'package javax.persistence does not exist'.

src/main/java/pl/piomin/samples/spring/j.general_idea: Migrate persistence annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
src/main/java/pl/piomin/samples/spring/j.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x; using it causes a compile-time 'package does not exist' error.

src/main/java/pl/piomin/samples/spring/j.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
src/main/java/pl/piomin/samples/spring/j.why_exists: The javax.persistence package was removed from the classpath in Spring Boot 3.x (which requires Jakarta EE 9+), causing a compile-time 'package not found' error.
